# Abdullah — AI Automation Expert & N8N Freelancer

> Abdullah is an AI Engineer and Automation Architect who builds custom AI systems and N8N workflow automations for businesses globally. He saves clients 300+ hours per month and dramatically increases their lead conversion rates.

## Who He Is

Abdullah is a specialist in:
- **N8N Workflow Automation** — end-to-end pipelines for lead capture, CRM sync, WhatsApp automation, invoice processing, and data pipelines
- **WhatsApp Business Automation** — AI sales agents that respond to leads, qualify them, book meetings, send reminders, and follow up — all automatically
- **Custom AI Model Development** — Computer Vision, NLP, and predictive analytics built with PyTorch / TensorFlow and deployed to AWS / GCP
- **AI Strategy Consulting** — full business process audits and actionable automation roadmaps with ROI projections
- **OpenAI / LLM Integration** — GPT-4, Claude, and custom LLM pipelines integrated into business workflows

He works with clients in Kuwait, UAE, Pakistan, and globally via remote collaboration.

## Proven Results (Real Client Projects)

### Real Estate Agency — Kuwait
- Lead response time reduced from 77 minutes to under 60 seconds
- Booked meetings per week increased from 12 to 31 (+158%)
- Agent admin time reduced from 4.5 hours/day to 20 minutes
- No-show rate reduced from 28% to 6%
- Built with: N8N, WhatsApp Business API, Google Calendar, OpenAI GPT-4o, Gmail

### DermaFusion Medical AI — Healthcare
- 99.8% diagnostic accuracy across 12 disease classifications
- 15 heterogeneous medical imaging datasets integrated
- Novel Domain-Stratified multi-branch architecture
- 1.2 second inference time on smartphone photos
- Built with: PyTorch, Computer Vision, Python, AWS

### E-Commerce Brand — Order & Reporting Automation
- Eliminated 3 staff members' daily manual work entirely
- 100% error-free automated reporting
- $8,000+ monthly operational cost savings
- Built with: N8N, Shopify API, Google Sheets, Slack, Gmail

### AI Email Assistant — Personal Productivity
- Email management reduced from 2.6 hours/day to 20 minutes
- 100% inbox automatically sorted and labelled
- AI-drafted replies in owner's writing style
- Zero missed urgent emails in 6 months of operation
- Built with: N8N, OpenAI GPT-4o, Gmail API

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Starting Price | Timeline |
|---|---|---|
| Single Workflow Automation | $800 | 1–2 weeks |
| Full AI System (multi-step) | $2,500 | 2–4 weeks |
| Custom AI Model Development | $3,500 | 3–8 weeks |
| Monthly Retainer & Support | $600/month | Ongoing |

## Key Technologies

N8N, Make (Integromat), WhatsApp Business API, OpenAI GPT-4o, Claude, HubSpot, Salesforce, Notion, Airtable, Google Sheets, Slack, Gmail API, Stripe, Shopify API, Google Calendar, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Python, AWS, GCP, Docker
